subcodes.first_line: He that hath loved Me hath indeed come, and hath quaffed the choice wine of reunion from the hand of My bounty, and hath desired a new gift [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی من احبنی و شرب رحیق اللقاء من ید عطائی و اراده نموده بارمغان جدید و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital
